channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak and Comparison with China’s Gaokao System
item.description: Recently, there have been reports about a paper leak of NEET UG 2026 in India, raising serious concerns about the integrity of the examination system. NEET, being India’s largest medical entrance exam...

item.title: Treasury Reports Persistent Financial Mismanagement in Municipalities
item.description: Financial management in many South African municipalities remains poor, with unauthorised, irregular, and wasteful expenditure rising to R268.13 billion in the 2024/2025 financial year, up from R264.1...

item.title: David Tennant attends Rivals season two premiere in London with wife Georgia and daughter Olive
item.description: Actor David Tennant attended the London premiere of the second season of Rivals alongside his wife Georgia Tennant and their daughter Olive at the BFI IMAX cinema. The family appeared together on the ...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of 'The Magnificent Seven' (1960): Cast, Filming, and Legacy
item.description: ‘The Magnificent Seven’ (1960), directed by John Sturges, is a landmark American Western and a remake of Akira Kurosawa’s 'Seven Samurai'. The film relocates the story from feudal Japan to the Mexican...

item.title: Indian Ex-Army Chief Emphasises Dialogue and People-to-People Contacts with Pakistan
item.description: Former Indian Army Chief, Gen (Retd) Manoj Naravane, has openly supported remarks by RSS Secretary General Dattatreya Hosabale calling for sustained dialogue between India and Pakistan. In an intervie...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Haley Joel Osment in “The Sixth Sense”
item.description: Haley Joel Osment, born on April 10, 1988, rose to fame as a child actor with roles in films such as Forrest Gump (1994), which earned him a Young Artist Award. His major breakthrough came with the 19...

item.title: Pakistan Passport Ranked 100th Globally with Visa-Free Access to 30 Countries
item.description: According to the latest Henley Passport Index, Pakistan’s passport is ranked 100th in the world, providing visa-free access to 30 countries. This ranking is based on 199 passports and 227 travel desti...

item.title: EADB unveils $13 million initiative to support women and youth-led enterprises in East Africa
item.description: The East African Development Bank (EADB) has officially launched a $13 million fund aimed at supporting businesses led by women and youth across East Africa. The announcement came during the bank’s Go...

item.title: Iranians Face Daily Struggles Amid Stalled Ceasefire and Rising Tensions
item.description: As tensions between the United States and Iran remain unresolved, ordinary Iranians are facing the harsh realities of life under the shadow of war. A CNN team traveling through northwestern Iran obser...

item.title: Families demand safe return of Pakistani crew kidnapped by Somali pirates
item.description: In Karachi, Ambreen Fatima staged a protest with her children seeking the release of her husband, Syed Hussain Yousuf, who is among 10 Pakistani crew members aboard the MT Honour 25, a Palau-flagged o...

item.title: Dar to host regional conference for women parliamentarians in 2026
item.description: Dar es Salaam, the commercial capital of Tanzania, has been selected to host the ICGLR Women Parliamentary Conference in 2026. This event will bring together women lawmakers from across the Internatio...

item.title: How Humphrey Bogart Used Platform Shoes to Match Co-Star Heights in Casablanca
item.description: During the filming of the 1942 classic movie Casablanca, Humphrey Bogart wore platform shoes, also known as shoe lifts, to adjust his height in relation to his co-stars. Bogart, who was approximately ...

item.title: Australian citizens to return from hantavirus-hit cruise ship with strict quarantine measures
item.description: The Australian government is organising the repatriation of six citizens and residents who were on board the MV Hondius, a Dutch cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak. Four Australian citizens...

item.title: Jonas Lovv Represents Norway with Rock Song ‘Ya Ya Ya’ at Eurovision 2026
item.description: Norwegian singer Jonas Lovv has been announced as Norway's representative for the Eurovision Song Contest 2026, performing his rock track 'Ya Ya Ya'. Lovv first gained recognition on the tenth season ...

item.title: Magix Enga’s Baby Mama Opens Up About Their Breakup and Raising Their Son Alone
item.description: Kenyan music producer Magix Enga is currently in the spotlight after his baby mama, Ruth Otieno, spoke out about their relationship. During a podcast on May 12, 2026, Ruth detailed her struggles raisi...

item.title: AfDB discussions target Africa's financing challenges
item.description: The African Development Bank (AfDB) is organising a series of meetings aimed at tackling the financing gap affecting African nations. The discussions will bring together finance ministers, development...

item.title: West Bengal Higher Secondary Exam 2026 Results Information
item.description: The West Bengal Higher Secondary (HS) examination results for 2026 have been announced. Students across the state have been eagerly waiting to know their performance, including pass percentages and th...

item.title: Railway employee Liaqat honoured posthumously for averting suicide attack in Attock
item.description: In a solemn ceremony at Aiwan-i-Sadr, President Asif Ali Zardari posthumously awarded the Sitara-i-Shujaat to Muhammad Liaqat, a railway worker who lost his life while courageously stopping a suicide ...

item.title: Scottish Premiership season finale to determine champion following Celtic's dramatic goal
item.description: The Scottish Premiership is set for a thrilling conclusion as the championship will be decided on the final day. Celtic's last-minute goal has dramatically altered the standings, keeping their title h...

item.title: Early Career of Ann Miller in 1930s Hollywood
item.description: The article looks back at the early years of actress and dancer Ann Miller during the late 1930s, highlighting how she launched her Hollywood career at an unusually young age. Born in 1923, Miller man...
